items.title: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.dek: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.body: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.dek: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.body: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lawyer in high-profile Ugandan treason case charged with related offence
items.dek: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.body: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.author: IriLine Desk
